seo.title: Care Staffing Agency in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Temporary and permanent care staffing across Greater London — support workers, healthcare assistants, night-shift and emergency cover for care homes and providers.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Care Staffing Agency in London
fields.sub: Whether it's temporary staffing solutions for health and care, permanent placements, or urgent last-minute cover, our team ensures that every shift is filled with qualified, vetted professionals who are ready to make a difference.

items.title: Support Workers
items.body: Compassionate professionals who assist with daily living, support, and engagement.

items.title: Healthcare Assistants
items.body: Skilled in personal care, mobility support, and monitoring, available via HCA network.

items.title: Emergency Care Cover
items.body: Immediate deployment of agency for care workers when unforeseen absences occur.

items.title: Night Shift Care Staff
items.body: Alert and responsive throughout the night to maintain safety and comfort.

items.title: Rapid Response
items.body: Our temporary placement agency model means we can often fill shifts within hours, anywhere in London.

items.title: Fully Vetted Staff
items.body: Every agency care worker undergoes enhanced DBS checks, right-to-work verification, and thorough reference checks.

items.title: CQC-Aligned Recruitment
items.body: Our process meets the exacting standards of the Care Quality Commission (CQC).

items.title: Consistent Quality
items.body: Many clients request the same staff repeatedly, ensuring continuity of care.

items.q: How quickly can your care staffing agency London respond to requests?
items.a: Often within hours, especially for clients in boroughs where we have active staff on standby.

items.q: Do you cover live-in and night shifts?
items.a: Yes, we provide live-in carers, night shift care staff, and emergency cover across all boroughs.
Support Workers, Healthcare Assistants, Live-in Carers, Night Shift Staff, and more via our temporary placement agency network.

fields.heading: Request Care Staff Today
fields.sub: Serving all London boroughs with temporary staffing solutions and permanent placements.
